_comment: Reference document — not consumed directly by Terraform. The active values live in modules/rds/main.tf inside the aws_db_parameter_group resource. Sync changes manually.
rationale: Hardening parameters for Pharmax Postgres. Forces TLS, captures useful DDL + slow-query telemetry without logging row contents (no PHI in logs), and caps long-running transactions that would hold RLS row locks.

parameters.name: rds.force_ssl
parameters.why: Reject non-TLS Postgres connections at the engine, not just the SG.

parameters.name: log_statement
parameters.why: Audit schema changes. Never set to 'all' or 'mod' — would log row payloads = PHI.

parameters.name: log_min_duration_statement
parameters.why: Log queries slower than 1s for tuning. Parameters are redacted by Postgres in this log path.

parameters.name: log_connections
parameters.why: Record who connects and from where (helps when chasing forgotten background jobs).

parameters.name: log_disconnections
parameters.why: Pair with log_connections to compute session durations.

parameters.name: shared_preload_libraries
parameters.why: Enables aggregate query telemetry for the perf dashboard.

parameters.name: track_io_timing
parameters.why: Cheap perf data — adds IO wait time to pg_stat_statements rows.

parameters.name: idle_in_transaction_session_timeout
parameters.why: Kill transactions left idle for >5 min. They would otherwise hold RLS row locks and block the workflow.

parameters.name: statement_timeout
parameters.why: Belt-and-suspenders to Prisma timeout — kill any 30s+ runaway query.

explicitly_not_set.name: log_statement = all
explicitly_not_set.why: Would log row payloads. PHI in logs is a HIPAA violation.

explicitly_not_set.name: rds.log_retention_period
explicitly_not_set.why: RDS-side retention; we instead export logs to CloudWatch and apply retention there.
